plugins.description: Production-grade development environment for Claude Code with 11 specialized agents, 33 slash commands, 24 skills, 15 hooks + 9 opt-in examples (21 events), and 9 rules. Includes TDD workflow, security review, code review, architecture analysis, build error resolution, and Chrome DevTools performance audits. MCP servers pinned to stable versions.
